name: Badd Pizza

restaurantLevelAllergenEvidence.statement: The restaurant cannot guarantee complete absence of listed allergens in its kitchens.
Fried dough, tenders, bites, mozzarella sticks, pizza logs, and fries are named in a fryer/gluten cross-contact warning.
Soy is described in various pizzas, wing sauces, tenders/bites, and many dressings; the statement is not product-complete.

notes: POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.

products.name: 3 Piece Chicken Tender Meal with Fries

adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

evidence.excerpt: Falls Church catalog includes Half-Baked, combos, sides, salads, pizzas, wings, tenders, bites, subs, desserts, beverages, and alcoholic beverages.
notes: Badd Pizza Falls Church full Toast menu

evidence.excerpt: Current service menu includes Hot Honey Pepperoni in whole, half, personal, gluten-free, and party presentations; it also repeats the cauliflower-crust cross-contact notice.
notes: Badd Pizza Falls Church current Toast menu

evidence.excerpt: Accessible official page lists everyday pizza-and-wing combos, daily specials, and weekday lunch specials.
Image alt text names pizza sizes, wings, salads, subs, sides, desserts, soda, water, and beer.

Indexed official content explicitly names soy uses, walnuts in spinach salad, fryer and cauliflower-crust gluten cross-contact warnings, and ingredient lists for dough, cauliflower crust, mozzarella, and meatballs.
Homepage lists the menu, Half-Baked, specials, allergen information, nutrition, and Falls Church address.

repairs.summary: Applied and validated the restaurant-specific POC catalog repair.
verificationCommands: recompute Ingredient Intelligence after direct catalog finalization
